artworks.title: Apsara in Gold
artworks.title_km: អប្សរក្នុងមាស
artworks.description: A reinterpretation of the sacred Apsara dancer rendered in 24k gold leaf and acrylic on canvas.

artworks.title: Angkor at Dawn
artworks.title_km: អង្គរពេលល្ហែ
artworks.description: Long-exposure photograph capturing the first light breaking over Angkor Wat's iconic silhouette.

artworks.title: Khmer Weave — Digital
artworks.title_km: ក្រចេះខ្មែរ — ឌីជីថល
artworks.description: A generative digital artwork inspired by traditional Cambodian silk weaving patterns.

artworks.title: Mekong Memories
artworks.title_km: 추억ន្ទន័មេគង្គ
artworks.description: Watercolour series capturing daily life along the Mekong River.

artworks.title: Guardian Spirit
artworks.title_km: វិញ្ញាណអ្នកការពារ
artworks.description: Bronze sculpture of a Neak Ta spirit guardian, cast using traditional lost-wax technique.

artworks.title: Silk Road Revival
artworks.title_km: ការស្ទាក់ស្ទើរផ្លូវវត្ថុផ្គត់ផ្គង់
artworks.description: Hand-woven Hol Lboeuk silk textile featuring ancient Khmer royal motifs.

artworks.title: Phnom Penh Neon
artworks.title_km: ភ្នំពេញអំពូល
artworks.description: Cyberpunk-inspired digital collage of Phnom Penh's night markets.

artworks.title: Tonle Sap Life
artworks.title_km: ជីវិតទន្លេសាប
artworks.description: Documentary photography series on the floating villages of Tonle Sap Lake.

artists.name: Sophea Khun
artists.bio: Sophea's work bridges traditional Cambodian iconography with contemporary abstraction. Her signature gold-leaf technique has been exhibited across Southeast Asia.

artists.name: Dara Meng
artists.name_km: មែង ដារ៉ា
artists.bio: Documentary photographer capturing the soul of Cambodia's landscapes and communities. Dara's Angkor series has been published in National Geographic.

artists.name: Pisey Ros
artists.bio: Pioneer of Cambodian digital art, Pisey creates generative works that reimagine traditional patterns through algorithms and code.

artists.name: Vireak Chhem
artists.bio: Master sculptor preserving ancient Khmer bronze-casting traditions while pushing them into contemporary contexts.

artists.name: Channary Lim
artists.name_km: លីម ចន្ទនារី
artists.bio: Third-generation silk weaver reviving endangered Hol Lboeuk patterns using natural dyes and hand looms.

events.title: Cambodia Art Week 2025
events.title_km: សប្តាហ៍សិល្បៈកម្ពុជា ២០២៥
events.description: Seven days celebrating contemporary Cambodian art with 50+ artists, live performances, and AI art installations.

events.title: Angkor Photo Festival
events.title_km: ព្រឹត្តិការណ៍ថតរូបអង្គរ
events.description: Annual international photography festival set against the backdrop of Angkor Wat.

events.title: Digital Khmer Hackathon
events.title_km: ការប្រកួតបង្កើតសិល្បៈឌីជីថល
events.description: 48-hour AI art creation challenge. Open to all skill levels. Prizes worth $5,000.

role.km: ចិត្រករ, ភ្នំពេញ

quote.en: RamaGallery gave me a global audience for my work. The AI caption tool alone saves me hours every week.
quote.km: RamaGallery ផ្តល់ឱ្យខ្ញុំនូវទស្សនិកជនពិភពលោក។ ឧបករណ៍ AI caption តែម្នាក់ឯងសន្សំសំចៃពេលវេលាជាច្រើនម៉ោងជារៀងរាល់សប្តាហ៍។

role.km: ជាងថតរូប, សៀមរាប

quote.en: The image protection system is unparalleled. My work stays mine while still reaching collectors worldwide.
quote.km: ប្រព័ន្ធការពាររូបភាពគ្មានប្រៀប។ ស្នាដៃរបស់ខ្ញុំនៅតែជាកម្មសិទ្ធិរបស់ខ្ញុំ ខណៈពេលដែលឈានដល់អ្នកប្រមូលទូទាំងពិភពលោក។

role.km: វិចិត្រករក្រណាត់, សៀមរាប

quote.en: Finally a platform that understands Cambodian art deeply — the Khmer interface feels like home.
quote.km: នៅទីបំផុតមានវេទិកាដែលយល់ដឹងអំពីសិល្បៈខ្មែរយ៉ាងជ្រៅ — ចំណុចប្រទាក់ភាសាខ្មែរមានអារម្មណ៍ដូចខ្ញុំនៅផ្ទះ។

role.km: ស្ថាបនិក និង នាយកប្រតិបត្តិ

bio.en: Former museum curator with a passion for democratising Cambodian art globally.

role.km: ប្រធានការគ្រប់គ្រង

bio.en: Art historian specialising in Khmer classical and contemporary movements.

role.km: វិស្វករស្នូល

bio.en: Full-stack engineer building the AI and platform infrastructure.

role.km: ប្រធានសហគមន៍

bio.en: Community builder connecting artists with collectors and patrons worldwide.

title.km: ការបង្ហោះផតហ្វូលីយ៉ូ

description.en: Professional portfolio pages with custom domain support, analytics, and SEO optimisation.
description.km: ទំព័រផតហ្វូលីយ៉ូវិជ្ជាជីវៈជាមួយការគាំទ្រដែននាម SEO

title.km: ស្ទូឌីយ៉ូ AI

description.en: AI-powered caption generation, tag suggestion, style analysis, and image upscaling.
description.km: ការបង្កើតចំណងជើងដោយ AI ការស្នើស្លាក និងការវិភាគស្ទីល

title.km: ការការពាររូបភាព

description.en: Advanced image protection with watermarking, signed URLs, and anti-scraping technology.
description.km: ការការពាររូបភាពជឿនលឿនជាមួយស្លាកទឹក URL ចុះហត្ថលេខា

description.en: Seamless artwork sales with secure payment processing and international shipping support.
description.km: ការលក់ស្នាដៃដោយភ្លាមៗ ជាមួយការដំណើរការទូទាត់ប្រាក់ដែលមានសុវត្ថិភាព

title.km: ផ្ទាំងវិភាគ

description.en: Deep insights into your audience, artwork performance, and collector behaviour.
description.km: ការយល់ដឹងជ្រៅជ្រះអំពីទស្សនិកជន ការប្រតិបត្តិការស្នាដៃ

title.km: វេទិកា ខ្មែរ/អង់គ្លេស

description.en: Fully bilingual platform designed natively for Cambodian artists and international collectors.
description.km: វេទិកាពីភាសាទាំងស្រុង រចនាដោយប្រចាំសម្រាប់វិចិត្រករខ្មែរ
